programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E04
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E04

programme.title: Munsters 121
programme.desc: Munsters 121

programme.title: Addams Family 116
programme.desc: Addams Family 116

programme.title: Love Boat 119
programme.desc: Love Boat 119

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: A sick circus bear escapes into the bush and Dr Tracy tries to find it before worried local ranchers kill it fearful that it will contaminate their water supply

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts want to give their charity committee gourmet chocolate hearts as a thank-you but when one turns out to have been part of a smuggling operation can Jonathan and Jennifer figure out what is going on before someone tries the special chocolates from an unknown admirer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Laceys husband assists the pair in cracking down on a crooked construction firm that is responsible for the death of a worker

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch have to locate and rescue a washed-up jazz pianist now compulsive gambler running for his life after stealing 2000 in counterfeit bills from a mob-connected club owner

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Mysterious evil tycoon John Bradford Horn returns to steal Airwolf after a botched murder and a chance encounter reveals the location of the Lair

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo and the baby are coming home from the hospital Theyll be staying at the Shady Rest temporarily so that Betty Jo and Steve can have some support Part of that support is a doctor coming from Beverly Hills Billie Jo and Bobbie Jo are hoping that the doctor is a young handsome eligible bachelor So they are somewhat dismayed to learn that the doctor is a she and a distant relative who is coming on the request of their mother based on the doctors reputation alone She ends up being Doctor Granny who is not what one most would consider a traditional doctor despite her own assertions When nearsighted Granny mistakes Dog for the baby Granny prescribes a powerful homemade medicinal therapy to transform a dog-like baby to a baby-like baby Dog takes the unfortunate brunt of Grannys therapy

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Gus Huffle the owner of the Pixley Bijou the only movie theater in the area has decided to close due to lack of business The people of the valley will do anything they can to help Gus stay open Joe thinks that a big part of the problem is that Richard Arlen and Charles Buddy Rogers who were supposed to come to the Bijou for the world premiere of their movie Wings 1927 decided instead to attend a premiere at the Roxy in New York City which left a bad feeling between the theater and the community Joe decides to write a scathing letter to Arlen and Rogers After receiving the letter Arlen and Rogers in turn believe that attending a world premiere of the movie at the Pixley Bijou - albeit forty years late - would be good publicity When that news hits the valley the arguments begin amongst the valley residents on who will lead the official event As Uncle Joe takes over due to the dissent everyone else quits the event committee leaving only Joe as the only one who will be attending the premiere due to the squabbling Will Arlen and Rogers visit to the valley be all for naught And will this non-event ruin Gus chances to keep the Bijou open

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Knight 304
programme.desc: Knight 304

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A college student dreams of becoming a werewolf and discovers an antique camera that will turn him into his favorite movie monster

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A swindler Jack loves money and twins One day he meets rich twins that show interest in him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An aging puppeteer suspects his much younger wife has a lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Forever Knight

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A bet between sergeants and Sergeant Carters lies result in Gomer dating Miss Camp Henderson and taking her to Lookout Point

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Both Gomer and Sergeant Carter are conned by an old bum

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways are scared that a group of gangsters are on the island but it turns out just to be a parrot who also squawks wildly when he hears the words boat and jewel

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George gets into a dustup with Grampa over a used vacuum cleaner which George wants to give to Kate as a gift

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Pepino feels his job is threatened when Grampa takes on another hired hand

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat 122
programme.desc: Love Boat 122

programme.title: WKRP 203
programme.desc: WKRP 203

programme.title: WKRP 104
programme.desc: WKRP 104

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Margaret admits to being unfaithful to Herman while she was on vacation in Greece--and finds she has plenty of company

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Emily is afraid of the costumes on Halloween and Taylor faces a crisis of confidence as an actor

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A trio of beauties become suspiciously good at the baccarat table Another player at the table Everett Mason wants in on their secret As it turns out so does aging French detective Nicholas Rambeau

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jonathan buys Jennifer a gorgeous old car for her birthday she is less than thrilled -- but two Brits seem suspiciously eager to take it off her hands

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Everyone gets the measles and Stef ends up taking care of them while Michael can only talk to her through the front door of the Inn or by phone George runs such a high fever that Stef calls the doctor to come in an emergency

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When the previous owners of the Stratford Inn become jealous of the inns new success they try to scare everyone into thinking the Inn is haunted in hopes of getting the Loudens to sell the Inn back to them

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: At the scene of an accident several people become possessed by a homicidal spirit which each of them preparing to make a demonic sacrifice While Donna helps Mitch investigate she comes in contact with the blood of a dead serial killer which happens to be the cause of the troubles and becomes possessed by the killers spirit out to get anyone around her

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 207
programme.desc: Hercules 207

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Belmans daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election somebody who will stand up to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A wealthy hunter stalks and wounds a rare hawk for a trophy Afterward the swamp takes Will into its confidence and Will sees the swamp as he never has before

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A favorite son now a huge success comes back to his hometown to start a new operation At first everyone seems to be happy hes back but simmering jealousies come to the front when someone threatens to kill him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne falsely accused of murder escapes the law He returns to White Bluff to clear his name by joining a train of settlers headed to California A ministers sister threatens to turn him in to the law until she gets to know him

programme.title: Young 316
programme.desc: Young 316

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two very different victims are murdered one a very rich foreign businessman found knifed; the other a poor black police informant found shot in a phone booth Meanwhile a Japanese industrialist is also found dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Belzig head of a bank in East Berlin tricks unwary people anxious to escape to the West that he can help them Instead he steals their money and kills them Hes amassing a fortune to launch a new Nazi movement The mission for the IM force is to put him out of business

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Deep Space
programme.desc: A spaceship with a hideous monster with an incredible appetite for flesh crashes to Earth Unsuspecting policemen Ian Mclemore and Jerry Merris investigate the wreckage They discover several small pods which they remove

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.desc: Gadget guards a priceless coin collection

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Dr Frost and his nephew invent a device that can alter the Earths weather and Cy-Kill snatches it to plunge the Earth into a permanent ice age

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades join forces with the criminal underworld to take over the United States

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gar lies to his son and daughter Octo and Seena saying Audric stole the root that he developed and that Jayce has taken credit for everything Gar is taken by Saw Boss and instructs Octo to get help from the Lightning League

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Every sail and all the sail-makers in Reykjavík have been confiscated by VENOM who play to raise the city from its foundations to find the lost fleet hidden beneath
